description_long: This is an ornate cup with a cylindrical form, featuring a tall, textured glass or translucent upper section and a lower section made of embossed, dark bronze or copper metal. The metal base is decorated with intricate floral or vine patterns, giving it a vintage or antique appearance. A single, elegantly curved handle is attached to one side, matching the metallic finish and style of the base. The cup's rim is uneven, with a wavy contour that adds to its decorative appeal. The glass portion appears slightly frosted or matte, contrasting with the shiny, embossed metal. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and artistry, suitable for both display and practical use.
description: An ornate cup with a frosted glass upper section and an embossed bronze or copper metal base, featuring a decorative handle and floral patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wavy rim, detailed floral embossing on the metal base, and the full handle on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the continuous floral pattern around the metal base.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle fully visible on the left and the embossed metal pattern wrapping around the cup.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle not visible, focusing on the uninterrupted decorative metalwork and the glass section above.
